resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def greatestLetter(self, s: str) -> str:
        seen = set(s)
        for c in 'ZYXWVUTSRQPONMLKJIHGFEDCBA':
            if c in seen and c.lower() in seen:
                return c
        return ""
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Scan the string once to collect all characters in a set, then iterate backwards from 'Z' to 'A' to find the first letter whose lowercase form also appears; this yields the greatest such letter in O(n) time and O(1) extra space.
